bullet_changes.original_text: Built a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL to serve 40+ internal dashboard endpoints, reducing average response time by 35%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered a high-performance REST API using Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL, serving 40+ internal dashboard endpoints with a 35% reduction in average response time

bullet_changes.original_text: Wrote integration tests with pytest covering 87% of new API surface area
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented comprehensive integration tests with pytest, covering 87% of the new API surface area and ensuring reliability of the FastAPI backend

bullet_changes.original_text: Migrated legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, added retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty
bullet_changes.revised_text: Refactored legacy cron job scripts from Bash to Python, incorporating retry logic and alerting via PagerDuty, leveraging Python's Celery task queue for efficient job processing

bullet_changes.original_text: Developed React components for a B2B SaaS admin dashboard, collaborating with designers using Figma specs
bullet_changes.revised_text: Architected a scalable B2B SaaS admin dashboard backend using Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL, collaborating with designers using Figma specs to ensure seamless frontend integration

bullet_changes.original_text: Set up CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions that cut deploy time from 25 minutes to 6 minutes
bullet_changes.revised_text: Deployed a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, Docker, and Git, reducing deploy time from 25 minutes to 6 minutes and ensuring seamless integration with the FastAPI backend

bullet_changes.original_text: Fixed 12 bugs in a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery; reduced delivery failure rate from 4% to 0.3%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Optimized a Node.js microservice handling webhook delivery, leveraging Redis for caching and RabbitMQ for message queuing, reducing delivery failure rate from 4% to 0.3% and ensuring high availability
